case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. GOURMET CATERING LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOURMET CATERING LLC DBA PASTA PARADISO $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $480.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2011 - NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT, MATTER WAS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBIT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,140.00 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT GOURMET CATERING LLC DBA PASTA PARADISO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED MAR-17-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOURMET CATERING LLC DBA PASTA PARADISO
